message.content:
@startuml
actor User
participant "UpdateUserServlet" as UpdateUserServlet
entity userDto:UserDto as UserDao1
database userDao:UserDao as Dao2
database users

== 生成 ==
User ->+ UpdateUserServlet : setId(id)
activate UpdateUserServlet
UpdateUserServlet -->- UserDao1 : setUserId(user_id)
deactivate UpdateUserServlet
updateuserservlet->>dao2:updateuser(Userdto)
@enduml
